questions.question: How should these tasks be executed?

options.label: Sequential (Recommended)
options.description: Work through tasks one at a time with review between each

options.label: Parallel
options.description: Spawn Task agents for independent tasks simultaneously

options.label: Sandboxed Secure
options.description: Isolated workers with no network/git access, uses research gates

options.description: Just show bd commands, you control everything
